titles.title: Paid in Full by the Blood

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: When justice called for a payment for sin No one worthy could be found among men But the precious Son of God With a cross and thorny crown Paid the debt with the Blood of the Lamb

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Paid in full by the Blood of the Lamb Free from sin, free to live now I am And it reads on the page, Where my sins were written down, "Paid in full by the Blood of the Lamb."

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Oh how great was the debt that I owed Bound to pay for the seeds I have sown But in Jesus my Lord A great treasure I have found I'm redeemed by the Blood of the Lamb
